# GrantOS
> The operating system for Web3 grants. Track ecosystem rounds, generate tailored applications with AI, and manage reporting milestones.

## Key Pages
- Landing: https://grantos.io/
- Onboarding: https://grantos.io/onboarding
- Grant Calendar: https://grantos.io/dashboard/grants
- Application Tracker: https://grantos.io/dashboard/tracker
- Settings: https://grantos.io/dashboard/settings

## About
GrantOS is a free, client-side Web3 grant CRM. All data stays on the user's device via localStorage — no account required. Supports Ethereum, Solana, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, and other L2 ecosystems.

## Features
- **Grant Calendar**: Browse 5 active grant programs across ecosystems with deadline tracking
- **AI Draft Generator**: Paste your project description once, get committee-specific application drafts via Groq AI (optional; manual editor fallback always available)
- **Application Tracker**: Kanban board to move applications through draft→submitted→under review→won/lost pipeline
- **Reporting Milestones**: Set automated reminders when an application is won
- **Project Profile**: Save project details (category, chains, metrics) that seed all AI drafts

## Technical Stack
- Framework: Next.js (React, Server Components)
- Data: localStorage (no server-side persistence)
- AI: Groq API (Llama 3) — optional, key not required
- Styling: Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui components
- Fonts: Geist (Sans + Mono)

## Pricing
GrantOS is completely free and open source. There are no paid tiers, no subscriptions, and no hidden costs. The project was intentionally built without billing infrastructure.

## Support
This is an open source project. Report issues or contribute at the GitHub repository.
